description: Broadcast a signed Execute (method invocation) transaction. Requires the signature obtained by signing the bytes from /SmartContract/Pack with method+params, plus the same target/method/params and transactionInnerId.
notes: After a successful Execute, fetch the return value via /Transaction/Result with the returned transactionId. If 'forgetNewState' is true the executor will not persist any state mutation (useful for read-only queries). Method parameters use the Credits Variant encoding {K_TYPE: <type>, V_<TYPE>: <value>} — supported K_TYPE: INT, LONG, SHORT, BYTE, BOOLEAN, FLOAT, DOUBLE, STRING. Aliases: 'PublicKey'/'publicKey', 'TransactionSignature'/'signature', 'Target'/'target'/'contractAddress', 'Method'/'method', 'Params'/'params', 'ForgetNewState'/'forgetNewState', 'TransactionInnerId'/'innerId'.
